translation.en: I just bought a new one.

exampleSentences: Em mua một cái áo mới.
notes:
mới = new. It describes something recently made, bought, or not used before.

It comes after the noun: noun + mới.  

As an adverb, mới also means “just / recently” and goes before the verb.  
Opposite of mới (new) is cũ (old) — an easy, high-frequency pair to remember.
sentenceBreakdowns: Em (I) + mua (buy) + một (a) + cái (classifier) + áo (shirt) + mới (new)
notes_md:
**mới** = new. It describes something recently made, bought, or not used before.

It comes **after the noun**: noun + mới.  

As an adverb, **mới** also means “just / recently” and goes before the verb.  
Opposite of *mới* (new) is **cũ** (old) — an easy, high-frequency pair to remember.

definitions.vi: mới được tạo ra hoặc có được; không cũ.
definitions.es: recientemente creado u obtenido; no viejo.
definitions.en: recently created or obtained; not old.

example.en: I just bought a new shirt.
example.es: Acabo de comprar una camisa nueva.
example.vi: Tôi vừa mua một chiếc áo mới.
